actions.title: Direction and route selection
actions.summary: Run the MAS stage that selects a medically defensible research direction and route.

actions.title: Baseline and evidence setup
actions.summary: Run the MAS stage that binds source, evidence, claim, and artifact baselines.

actions.title: Bounded analysis campaign
actions.summary: Run the MAS stage that produces reviewable analyses inside the accepted medical claim boundary.

actions.title: Manuscript authoring
actions.summary: Run the MAS stage that materializes a medically grounded manuscript candidate for independent review.

actions.title: Review and quality gate
actions.summary: Run the independent MAS cross-stage review and return an owner result, route-back, quality debt, blocker, or human gate.

actions.title: Finalize and publication handoff
actions.summary: Run the MAS stage that prepares a publication handoff without bypassing human submission authority.

actions.title: Study lifecycle reactivation authority evaluation
actions.summary: Validate raw-byte-bound fresh user authority, reviewer revision intake, inactive lifecycle, first owning Stage, and exact lifecycle projections before authorizing one OPL-hosted journaled all-or-rollback CAS materialization.

actions.title: Candidate admission authority evaluation
actions.summary: Validate one exact current MAS adjudicator receipt and return a manifest-bound candidate admission result.

actions.title: Build dependency currentness authority evaluation
actions.summary: Issue one exact MAS build-dependency currentness owner result from a distinct OPL-managed authority attempt for later host injection into paper mission.

actions.title: Paper mission authority evaluation
actions.summary: Validate exact candidate, professional Skill, generation, review-currentness, and exact-byte package receipts before returning a MAS paper-mission result.

notes: The six public actions are canonical MAS stage actions hosted by OPL.

The lifecycle-reactivation, candidate-admission, build-dependency-currentness, and paper-mission authority actions are internal read-only handler bindings and are not exported as user-facing generated surfaces.
Lifecycle reactivation becomes domain truth only after the OPL CAS materialization receipt matches the MAS authority result; provider completion cannot infer or overwrite it.
Legacy source_command metadata and repo-local CLI, MCP, product, status, workbench, queue, session, and lifecycle commands are not part of this catalog.
